meta.title: Intech - Building the Industrial Workforce of the Future
meta.description: Leading platform for courses, student mobility, and industry consultancy.

footer.tagline: Building the industrial workforce of the future. Start small. Grow fast. Go global. Leading industry training and consultancy ecosystem, helping individuals and businesses master industry 4.0 and integrate into global supply chains.

courses.page_description: Equip yourself with practical knowledge, lead the industry 4.0 trend with in-depth training topics from Intech Global Academy.

hero.description: Leading industry training and consultancy ecosystem, helping individuals and businesses master industry 4.0 and integrate into global supply chains.

pillars.title: Comprehensive Ecosystem
pillars.description: Intech Global Academy integrates three strategic pillars to bring sustainable value to both individuals and businesses.

pillar1.title: Practical Education
pillar1.desc: Training programs from basic to advanced in AI, Lean, IoT, and Supply Chain, designed by industry leading experts.

pillar2.title: Industry Consultancy
pillar2.desc: Operational optimization, factory digital transformation, and compliance management consultancy to help businesses enhance competitiveness.

pillar3.title: Student Mobility
pillar3.desc: Global career pathways, connecting students with high-level labor markets abroad sustainably.

featured_courses.title: Focus Training
featured_courses.description: Programs designed closely to actual industry and logistics needs, updated with latest technology trends.

why_choose_us.title: Why choose Intech Global Academy?
why_choose_us.item1_desc: Programs closely follow actual industry and logistics needs.
why_choose_us.item2_desc: Not just learning, students receive career roadmap advice and international connection.
why_choose_us.item3_desc: Instructors are directly operating in large enterprises.
why_choose_us.item4_desc: LMS application provides flexible online/offline learning experience.

workshop.title: AI-Powered Workflow
workshop.description: Optimize work performance with top-notch Prompting techniques and AI automation processes in just 03 sessions.

vision.text: "Become one of the top 5 industrial training and solution consultancy units in Vietnam, aiming to expand throughout Southeast Asia."

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Intech Global Academy is a pioneering organization in Vietnam integrating a practical industrial training and consultancy ecosystem model.
about.intro_title: Bridging the gap between academia and practice
about.intro_desc: We are built on a deep understanding of the domestic industrial market. By connecting three strategic pillars — Industry, Education, and Global Mobility — Intech Global Academy creates a comprehensive development pathway for the future industrial workforce in Vietnam and Southeast Asia.
about.mission_desc: Serving as a strategic bridge between key ecosystems of the modern economy.
about.mission_industry_desc: Enhance operational capacity, optimize processes and drive meaningful digital transformation for manufacturing and logistics enterprises.
about.mission_education_desc: Standardize skills and equip practical knowledge for students and working professionals, preparing them for high-level positions.
about.mission_mobility_desc: Open cross-border career and learning opportunities through an international learning and experience ecosystem.
about.focus_subtitle: At Intech Global Academy, all activities are guided by 5 core values.
about.focus_f_desc: Always leading in updating technology (AI, IoT) and anticipating future industrial trends.
about.focus_o_desc: Committed to delivering the highest efficiency in improving business processes and individual career paths.
about.focus_c_desc: Building a tight network linking Academia – Business – Global Labor Market.
about.focus_u_desc: Unlock the unlimited potential of people and unleash technological power to create new breakthroughs.
about.focus_s_desc: Create collective strength from the synergy of 3 core activity areas, growing together with partners and students.
about.cta_desc: Explore in-depth courses designed specifically for the industrial sector, helping you master technology and optimize operations.
about.privacy_desc: Learn how we collect, use and protect your personal data and information on our system.
about.terms_desc: Learn about the regulations, rights and legal responsibilities when using Intech's services.

contact.subtitle: Intech Global Academy is always ready to listen and support your industrial career guidance.

consultant.subtitle: Get direct consultancy from experts working at leading global technology corporations and educational organizations.
consultant.why_subtitle: Intech's difference lies in its network of genuine experts, not just lecturers.
consultant.why_item1_desc: Learn from real projects, real mistakes and professional handling from the market.
consultant.why_item2_desc: Expand your networking with highly influential people in the industry.
consultant.why_item3_desc: Not just knowledge — you will receive a solid career roadmap.

privacy.title: ONLINE PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.intro: This policy governs how Intech Global Academy collects and processes information when you access and interact with features on the website.
privacy.section1_item1_desc: We automatically collect information via Cookies and similar technologies, including IP address, browser type, language and access time to optimize website display.
privacy.section1_item2_desc: The website uses cookies to remember user preferences and analyze traffic to improve the user experience on the site.
privacy.section2_item1_desc: When you use forms on the website (such as newsletter signup, course consultation requests, workshop participation), we collect your full name, email and phone number.
privacy.section2_item2_desc: This information is only used to respond to your requests, provide information about courses (such as the AI-Powered Workflow Workshop) or training programs you are interested in.
privacy.section3_desc1: We use HTTPS/SSL protocol to encrypt data transmitted between your browser and the website server to prevent unauthorized interference.
privacy.section3_desc2: Personal data collected through the website is stored in a strictly controlled environment and absolutely not shared with any third party for marketing purposes.
privacy.footer_contact: For any questions about the privacy policy, please contact: support@intechisc.com

terms.title: WEBSITE TERMS OF USE
terms.intro: By accessing the Intech Global Academy website, you agree to comply with the following regulations.
terms.section1_title: 1. Intellectual property rights on the website
terms.section1_desc1: All content displayed on the website including: Taglines, course descriptions, training catalog (Applied AI, Quality Management, IoT...), images and source code are the intellectual property of Intech.
terms.section1_desc2: Users may only view and reference content. Any copying or online content citation for commercial purposes without written consent from Intech is strictly prohibited.
terms.section2_item1_desc: No automated tools (bots, scrapers) may be used to collect data from the website; actions that obstruct or overload the website's technical infrastructure are prohibited.
terms.section2_item2_desc: Users commit to not submitting content that violates the law, is offensive or contains malicious code through contact forms on the website.
terms.section3_desc: The website may contain links to other websites (e.g.: AI tools such as ChatGPT, Gemini or learning management platforms). Intech is not responsible for the content or privacy policies of these third-party websites.
terms.section4_title: 4. Limitation of liability for online information
terms.section4_desc: Information about courses and solutions on the website (such as the roadmap diagram "Start Small. Scale Fast. Go Global") is for introduction and reference purposes. Intech reserves the right to update or change this content at any time without prior notice.
terms.footer_contact: For any questions about the terms of use, please contact: support@intechisc.com
